column1: # Per-model timeout overrides (seconds). Used by dev/skills/benchmark_full.py
# when a model's runtime is bounded by sample-time output rather than by
# the SSA loop and so the default (max(60, 50*nfsim_time)) doesn't fit.
# A_plus_B_rings: n_steps=10000 means record_at is called 10000 times, each
# evaluating all Species observables over ~3000 molecules. Engine loop is
# <1s but total wall time is ~4min due to O(n_steps × n_mols) Species
